## Meeting Purpose

[Product walkthrough of Firework's video commerce solutions for GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Firework offers an integrated suite of video products for ecommerce: short videos, live showrooms, 1-on-1 video shopping assistants, and an AI virtual assistant called Ava](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Their solutions aim to elevate the online shopping experience with interactive video content, live demos, personalized assistance, and AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Key differentiators include global video infrastructure, enterprise compliance, integration with major platforms, and an ecosystem approach connecting their products](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Topics

### Product Overview

  - [Firework is not just a video player - it has underlying video CMS, global CDN infrastructure, enterprise integrations](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Four main products: short videos, showrooms, 1-on-1 video shopping, Ava virtual assistant](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Products work together as an integrated ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)

### Short Videos

  - [Embeddable video carousels, product cards for ecommerce product pages](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Import videos from social, add product tags, customize placements](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Addresses issues with GIFs, YouTube embeds taking traffic away](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

### Showrooms

  - [Live, interactive video streaming for product launches, Q\&A, demos](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Chat, product cards, giveaways to drive engagement](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
  - ["Co-pilot" AI can answer common questions without human moderator](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
  - [Encourages frequent live sessions to build user habits](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)

### 1-on-1 Video Shopping

  - [Replicates in-store personalized shopping assistance](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
  - [Brand experts give live video walkthroughs, demos, measurements](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=2233.0)
  - [Identifies high-intent shoppers to prioritize assistance](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)
  - [Option for Firework sales associates on-demand](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=2447.0)

### Ava Virtual Assistant

  - [AI-powered video shopping assistant with human-like face/voice](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=2824.0)
  - [Guides discovery with questions, shows product videos, compares options](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
  - [Built on private knowledge base to ensure brand safety](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=2948.0)
  - [Can transition to live human agent for high-value/complex requests](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=2858.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy will summarize notes and insights into GrowthX's content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=3564.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to feature Firework's product updates/launches in content](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=3588.0)
  - [Set up email subscriptions for Firework product news](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=3688.0)
  - [Potentially schedule deeper dives with Firework's product managers](https://fathom.video/share/9u9aW11NA2B7MzUs2Umce4nN6hRgULAS?tab=summary&timestamp=3600.0)
